dialogueChunks.intro: A traveler passing through brought word of something strange {location_hint}. The {quest_focus}: something that no one can explain, arranged in patterns that do not match any known builders.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: I have asked around and {quest_ally} confirmed similar signs were spotted months ago. Whatever left these behind was deliberate about placement. Someone needs to bring back evidence from the site: {quest_item} that might explain what we are dealing with.
dialogueChunks.outro: The {enemy_type} seem drawn to those sites too, which worries me. Are you curious enough to go, {player_name}?

dialogueChunks.intro: Something near {location_hint} has been behaving strangely. The {quest_focus} defies explanation: things that should not happen are happening, and it is getting worse.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} ventured to the edge and returned shaken. They said the area felt wrong in ways they could not describe. Even the {enemy_type} avoid it. We need someone to talk to {target_npc}, who once ventured there and may know what the {quest_threat} actually is.
dialogueChunks.outro: Something unnatural is happening out there, {player_name}. We need answers {quest_time_pressure} before it reaches our walls.

dialogueChunks.intro: Workers digging near {location_hint} broke through into something they were not expecting: the {quest_focus}, made of materials no one recognizes. They sealed the entrance and came here.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They swear it was warm to the touch and humming. {target_npc} thinks it could be a vault, a tomb, or something else entirely. Whatever is inside, we need {quest_item} retrieved before the breach draws more attention from the {enemy_type}.
dialogueChunks.outro: It needs someone who can handle surprises. The workers will not go back down. Will you, {player_name}? {quest_reward_hint} may well be waiting inside.
